warnings: Automated v0.1 uses public RSS sources with URLs for reliability; Yahoo Scout browser collection remains a separately documented POC path.

items.headline: Ex-Kansas player charged with attempted murder
items.detail: Lagerald Vick, a member of the Kansas Jayhawks' Final Four basketball team in 2018, has been charged with attempted first-degree murder in Tennessee.

items.headline: Sources: Brown HC Martin becomes U-M assistant
items.detail: Mike Martin, the winningest basketball coach at Brown, is leaving the Bears to become an assistant on Mike Boynton's staff at Michigan, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Ranking top coaches: Can Curt Cignetti win this ti...
items.detail: Our reporters make -- and defend -- their picks for the coaches they'd want to lead their team.

items.headline: 2026 WNBA championship odds: Lynx remain on top; V...
items.detail: Entering the week at 17-7, the Golden State Valkyries now have the fourth-shortest odds to win the WNBA title.

items.headline: Prospects watch: The future is not quite now
items.detail: Eric Karabell reports from the MLB draft and Futures Game to let fantasy managers know whose names you need to know.

items.headline: Ohtani, Witt and ... Pete Alonso! First-half MVPs ...
items.detail: We name each club's top performer so far -- and how many All-Stars they'd have in a perfect world.

items.headline: Live updates: France, Spain meet with World Cup fi...
items.detail: null

items.headline: Balogun: Red card 'controversy' affected USMNT
items.detail: United States striker Folarin Balogun revealed that he predicted President Donald Trump's involvement in overturning his World Cup suspension would "cause a lot of controversy."

items.headline: Infantino reported to IOC over Trump ties at WC
items.detail: A complaint alleging FIFA president Gianni Infantino has breached rules on political neutrality in his dealings with President Donald Trump has been submitted to the International Olympic Committee.

items.headline: Man United sign Villa's Tielemans in $47M deal
items.detail: Manchester United have announced the signing of midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa.

items.headline: New Napoli coach Allegri regrets collapse at Milan...
items.detail: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

items.headline: Mac Allister may draw on PL experience vs England
items.detail: Argentina midfielder Alexis Mac Allister said playing in the Premier League with Liverpool may be helpful when facing England on Wednesday in Atlanta.

items.headline: Kane: England can't focus on Argentina history
items.detail: Harry Kane says a World Cup semifinal against historic rivals Argentina is "as big as it gets" but stressed England cannot be drawn into the emotional baggage surrounding the fixture.

items.headline: Sources: Unimpressed Atleti end Greenwood talks
items.detail: Marseille forward Mason Greenwood is nearing a four-year deal deal with Fenerbahçe after Atlético Madrid dropped their pursuit of the former Manchester United player -- saying he was unreachable, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Besiktas, Arsenal agree $22.8M deal for Trossard
items.detail: Besiktas have agreed a deal with Arsenal for winger Leandro Trossard, the north London club have announced.

items.headline: 🥤 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
items.detail: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
items.detail: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
items.detail: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.
